public_boundary.include_semantics: Exhaustive tracked public file anchors and directory prefixes; every tracked or unignored candidate file must be covered and is scanned by github_release_file_audit.py.
exclude: raw source bundles, real provider review jobs, and ingestion runs
real multi-trial portfolio reviews, reviewer working identities, and ontology-resolution artifacts
real policy checkpoints and policy-run artifacts
huggingface/croissant.json (metadata for the separate external clinical-trial-decision-benchmark)

surface_scope.github: Full sanitized bounded agent, execution core, typed policy replanning and checkpoint resume, source capture, CDC MMWR, NCBI PubMed treatment-gap and disease-model, ChEMBL functional-activity, ClinicalTrials.gov endpoint/safety trial-design and atomic multi-trial portfolio verifiers, reviewer-approved endpoint mapping, explicit mapping-gated source-disjoint non-pooled clinical synthesis, payload-free manifest compiler, disease/target/assay/model-system/intervention/trial/design/safety/mapping/synthesis identity ledgers, protocol, adapter, flow, verifier, benchmark-scorer, documentation, tests, and audit surface.
surface_scope.hugging_face: Commit-pinned subset containing the dependency-free source capture/compiler, typed policy replanning and hash-bound checkpoint resume contracts, CDC MMWR, NCBI PubMed treatment-gap and disease-model, ChEMBL functional-activity, ClinicalTrials.gov endpoint/safety trial-design and atomic multi-trial portfolio verifiers, reviewer-approved endpoint mapping, explicit mapping-gated source-disjoint non-pooled clinical synthesis, pinned-evidence and clinical-synthesis adapters and bindings, bounded planner, disease/target/assay/model-system/intervention/trial/design/safety/mapping/synthesis identity ledgers, semantic mappings, stage and program runners, matched evaluator, executable core, tests, documentation, schemas, aggregate evidence, audit code, and the scorer for the separately hosted clinical-trial decision dataset.
github_only: live adapter implementations other than adapters/execution_registry.py, adapters/pinned_evidence_adapter.py, and adapters/clinical_synthesis_adapter.py
surface_scope.external_dataset_metadata: Croissant metadata belongs to jang1563/clinical-trial-decision-benchmark and is intentionally absent from this repository's Hugging Face package.

required_checks.name: python_lint
required_checks.command: python3 -m ruff check agentic_drug_discovery tests adapters/boltz_adapter.py adapters/chembl_adapter.py adapters/opentargets_adapter.py adapters/execution_registry.py adapters/pinned_evidence_adapter.py adapters/clinical_synthesis_adapter.py scripts/audit

required_checks.name: python_compile
required_checks.command: python3 -m compileall agentic_drug_discovery adapters chains benchmark/src scripts/audit tests

publication_gates: Apache-2.0 license present and consistent across metadata
No sensitive content in tracked or unignored candidate files
No raw source snapshots or evaluator-only labels
No raw source bundles, real provider review jobs, ingestion runs, or reviewer working files
No real policy checkpoints or policy-run artifacts
No scheduler logs, local paths, credentials, or machine-specific breadcrumbs
Vertical-slice benchmark numbers remain caveats-first and small-N scoped

Source capture/compiler, typed policy replanning and checkpoint resume, CDC MMWR, NCBI PubMed treatment-gap and disease-model, ChEMBL functional-activity, ClinicalTrials.gov endpoint/safety trial-design and multi-trial portfolio verification, reviewer-approved endpoint mapping, and explicit mapping-gated source-disjoint non-pooled clinical synthesis, typed endpoint and lineage-independent preclinical promotion, atomic clinical endpoint/safety promotion, bounded planner, disease/target/assay/model-system/intervention/trial/design/safety/mapping/synthesis identity continuity, semantic mapper, eight-stage provider-backed program replay, matched evaluator, core tests, and wheel build pass without private research artifacts
Hugging Face candidate package is built from the exact committed candidate and validated by file hashes
Release decision packet remains pending until the exact candidate commit and package receive explicit approval
Release audit workflow green on GitHub

hugging_face.rule: Do not merge or upload the candidate until final human boundary review approves the exact committed release package.
